name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.ingredients` has an RLS policy `Enable delete access for all users` for `DELETE` that allows unrestricted access (USING clause is always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for -.

metadata.name: ingredients
metadata.policy_name: Enable delete access for all users

name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.ingredients` has an RLS policy `Enable update access for all users` for `UPDATE` that allows unrestricted access (both USING and WITH CHECK are always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for -.

metadata.name: ingredients
metadata.policy_name: Enable update access for all users
